mapper.sql: remm.year, remm.month, remm.date, remm.employee_id, remm.job_id, remm.dept_id, remm.id, remm.update_time, remm.update_by, remm.create_time, remm.create_by

${tAlias}.year as ${tAlias}_year, ${tAlias}.month as ${tAlias}_month, ${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.job_id as ${tAlias}_job_id, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into re_emp_mes_monthly (year, month, date, employee_id, job_id, dept_id, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by) values (#{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{month,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_emp_mes_monthly set year = #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, month = #{month,jdbcType=INTEGER}, date = #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_id = #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into re_emp_mes_monthly( year, month, date, employee_id, job_id, dept_id, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by, year_month ) select year(getdate()), month(getdate()), getdate(), pe.id, pej.job_id, pej.dept_id, getdate(), -1, getdate(), -1, case when month(getdate()) < 10 then convert(int, (convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + '0' + convert(varchar(1), month(getdate())))) else convert(int, convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + convert(varchar(2), month(getdate()))) end from pm_employee pe join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pej.job_main_flag = 1
mapper.select: select case when exists (select 1 from re_emp_mes_monthly where year = #{year, jdbcType = INTEGER} and month = #{month, jdbcType = INTEGER} ) then 0 else 1 end

select (select count(1) from re_emp_mes_monthly where dept_id = #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and year = year(getdate()) and month = month(getdate())) as current_total, (select case when count(1) < 12 then null else convert(decimal(3, 0), avg(dft.total * 1.0)) end as job_first_total from (select count(1) as total, year_month from re_emp_mes_monthly where dept_id = #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and YEAR_MONTH <= case when month(getdate()) < 10 then convert(int, (convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + '0' + convert(varchar(1), month(getdate())))) else convert(int, convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + convert(varchar(2), month(getdate()))) end and YEAR_MONTH > case when month(dateadd(mm, -12,getdate())) < 10 then convert(int, (convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -1,getdate()))) + '0' + convert(varchar(1), month(dateadd(yyyy, -1,getdate()))))) else convert(int, convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -1,getdate()))) + convert(varchar(2), month(dateadd(yyyy, -1,getdate())))) end group by YEAR_MONTH) dft) as first_total , (select count(1) from re_emp_mes_monthly where dept_id = #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and year = year(dateadd(yyyy, -1,getdate())) and month = month(getdate())) as second_total , (select count(1) from re_emp_mes_monthly where dept_id = #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and year = year(dateadd(yyyy, -2,getdate())) and month = month(getdate())) as third_total, #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT} as dept_id

select (select count(1) from re_emp_mes_monthly where job_id = #{jobId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and year = year(getdate()) and month = month(getdate())) as current_total, (select case when count(1) < 12 then null else convert(decimal(3, 0), avg(jft.total * 1.0)) end as job_first_total from (select count(1) as total, year_month from re_emp_mes_monthly where job_id = #{jobId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and YEAR_MONTH <= case when month(getdate()) < 10 then convert(int, (convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + '0' + convert(varchar(1), month(getdate())))) else convert(int, convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + convert(varchar(2), month(getdate()))) end and YEAR_MONTH > case when month(dateadd(mm, -12,getdate())) < 10 then convert(int, (convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -1,getdate()))) + '0' + convert(varchar(1), month(dateadd(yyyy, -1,getdate()))))) else convert(int, convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -1,getdate()))) + convert(varchar(2), month(dateadd(yyyy, -1,getdate())))) end group by YEAR_MONTH) jft) as first_total , (select case when count(1) < 12 then null else convert(decimal(3, 0), avg(jst.total * 1.0)) end as job_second_total from (select count(1) as total, year_month from re_emp_mes_monthly where job_id = #{jobId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and YEAR_MONTH <= case when month(dateadd(yyyy, -1, getdate())) < 10 then convert(int, (convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -1, getdate()))) + '0' + convert(varchar(1), month(dateadd(yyyy, -1, getdate()))))) else convert(int, convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -1, getdate()))) + convert(varchar(2), month(dateadd(yyyy, -1, getdate())))) end and YEAR_MONTH > case when month(dateadd(mm, -12,dateadd(yyyy, -1, getdate()))) < 10 then convert(int, (convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -2,getdate()))) + '0' + convert(varchar(1), month(dateadd(yyyy, -2,getdate()))))) else convert(int, convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -2,getdate()))) + convert(varchar(2), month(dateadd(yyyy, -2,getdate())))) end group by YEAR_MONTH) jst) as second_total , (select case when count(1) < 12 then null else convert(decimal(3, 0), avg(jtt.total * 1.0)) end as job_third_total from (select count(1) as total, year_month from re_emp_mes_monthly where job_id = #{jobId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and YEAR_MONTH <= case when month(dateadd(yyyy, -2, getdate())) < 10 then convert(int, (convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -2, getdate()))) + '0' + convert(varchar(1), month(dateadd(yyyy, -2, getdate()))))) else convert(int, convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -2, getdate()))) + convert(varchar(2), month(dateadd(yyyy, -2, getdate())))) end and YEAR_MONTH > case when month(dateadd(mm, -12,dateadd(yyyy, -2, getdate()))) < 10 then convert(int, (convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -3,getdate()))) + '0' + convert(varchar(1), month(dateadd(yyyy, -3,getdate()))))) else convert(int, convert(varchar(4), year(dateadd(yyyy, -3,getdate()))) + convert(varchar(2), month(dateadd(yyyy, -3,getdate())))) end group by YEAR_MONTH) jtt) as third_total, #{jobId, jdbcType = BIGINT} as job_id
